<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace DI\Factory; /** * Represents the container entry that was requested. * * Implementations of this interface can be injected in factory parameters in order * to know what was the name of the requested entry. * * @api * * @author Matthieu Napoli <matthieu@mnapoli.fr> */ interface RequestedEntry { /** * Returns the name of the entry that was requested by the container. */ public function getName() : string; }
